title: Glazed Tandoor Lentils
description: A flavorful and nutritious dish that combines the tender texture of lentils with the sweetness of a glaze, inspired by Ethiopian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Tandoor Spice
ingredients.notes: Available in most Indian grocery stores

ingredients.name: Glazed Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: Available in most Asian grocery stores

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Vegetable or chicken broth is also acceptable

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red lentils, tandoor spice, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
While the lentils are cooking, prepare the glaze by whisking together the glazed soy sauce and honey.
Once the lentils are done, stir in the glaze and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve the lentils hot, garnished with a drizzle of additional glaze if desired.
